title: Implement anonymous comments with moderation
goal: Allow anonymous users to submit comments while protecting the site from spam and abuse.
scope: Store comments as pending by default.
verification: Approved comment appears on post page.
notes: Implemented public comment listing and submission endpoints with pending-by-default workflow.
Implemented admin comment queues and moderation actions for approved, spam, and deleted states.
Added frontend comment submission and admin moderation UI.
Automated checks passed: web lint, web typecheck, web build, api go test, mcp go test.
Docker-backed runtime smoke test was attempted but blocked by Docker CLI timeouts in the local environment.
